findings.message: Model contains no ref() or source() calls — all upstream dependencies must use dbt's dependency resolution.
Hardcoded reference 'raw.jaffle_shop.orders' — use {{ ref('model') }} or {{ source('src', 'table') }} instead.
Hardcoded reference 'raw.jaffle_shop.payments' — use {{ ref('model') }} or {{ source('src', 'table') }} instead.
Avoid SELECT * — list columns explicitly for deterministic output and performance.
ORDER BY in a non-final model is redundant — dbt doesn't guarantee row order. Remove it or move to the final mart model.
Join fanout risk: joining orders (1) to payments (many) without aggregating payments first. Each order with multiple payments will produce multiple rows, inflating downstream counts.
Model 'stg_bad_orders' has no entry in schema.yml — add a description and tests.
